focus: C112: R1 architecture specified — igt-r1-architecture.md written, concretizing the R1 gap for DC#3 full as a three-component design (R1a reference computation, R1b formal specification language, R1c cross-tool calibration metric). Modular arithmetic (Grokking task, p=97) is the R1a candidate. CIF is the R1b template. Circuit IoU + CAI is the R1c metric. SI document updated with C111+C112 references. D4 streak: 103.

igt_status.name: Interpretability-Grounding Theorem
igt_status.d4_blocked_by: DC#3 full — requires R1 (R1a reference computation + R1b formal spec language + R1c cross-tool metric) + R3 (AICD institutional mandate) + P1 prediction confirmed
igt_status.forward_prediction: P1 — circuit-verified claims replicate >85%; behavioral benchmark rankings replicate <50%

dc3_gap_status.r1_gap: Three components: R1a (reference computation — modular arithmetic Grokking task, Fourier mechanism ground truth); R1b (formal specification language — CIF analog, machine-checkable circuit claim syntax with verification conditions); R1c (cross-tool calibration metric — Circuit IoU + Causal Agreement Index, FSC-0.143 analog threshold). Full R1: ~10-15 years. R1a: ~2-5 years.
dc3_gap_status.r3_gap: AICD (AI Circuit Database) as wwPDB analog. Five required properties specified in igt-wwpdb-analog-architecture.md (C111). Phase 2 entry (voluntary deposition) enabled by R1a; Phase 3 (near-zero OA-DoF, DC#3 full) requires R1b + R1c + mandatory enforcement.
dc3_gap_status.r1_r3_dependency: R1b (formal spec language) is required before AICD apparatus-computed validation can operate at Phase 3 level. AICD can operate in Phase 2 mode (reduced OA-DoF) accepting natural language circuit reports before R1b is agreed. R1a enables Phase 2 entry. R1b + R1c enable Phase 3.
dc3_gap_status.phase_2_entry_marker: R1a — agreed reference computation (modular arithmetic / Grokking task as de facto standard). Voluntary AICD deposition begins.
dc3_gap_status.phase_3_entry_marker: R1 full (R1a + R1b + R1c) + R3 full (AICD mandatory enforcement + consortium governance) + agreed calibration threshold. DC#3 full evaluable at Phase 3.

cryo_em_enforcement_insight: FSC metric (1999) existed 14 years before Phase 3. Mandatory EMDB deposition (2013) completed the Phase 2→3 transition. AICD follows same pattern: R1a metric precedes mandatory enforcement; R1b + AICD mandatory enforcement completes transition. Confirmed across cryo-EM (EMDB), NMR (BMRB mandatory 2010), geochronology (EARTHTIME).
cif_r1b_insight: CIF (Crystallographic Information File, 1991) is the closest historical template for R1b — machine-readable format for structural claims enabling automated validation. Before CIF: free-text prose reports. After CIF: machine-parseable, automated checkCIF/PLATON validation. Transition took ~9 years (1991 to widespread adoption 1996-2000). R1b analog would provide formal grammar for circuit claims with apparatus-computable verification conditions.
